title: Developer mode - show app version on recipes/blocks in automations
excerpt: When a user has Developer mode turned on, can it show the version of the app the recipe/block refers to? I know in dev accounts where we see draft versions it shows us the version, but I’m referring to for customers that…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
When a user has Developer mode turned on, can it show the version of the app the recipe/block refers to? I know in dev accounts where we see draft versions it shows us the version, but I’m referring to for customers that have it installed.

Since major version changes pin recipes at the old version - this would let customers see which recipes may be out of date (for troubleshooting). It would also reveal if an account/recipes are malfunctioning and referring to deprecated minor version.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @anon29275264,

That is not possible as of today.

But I will create a request for it!

Thank you for the feedback!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Request monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
